title: HubSpot Integration - Full sync for custom fields
excerpt:
I love the Monday.com and Hubspot integration - just what I have been looking for. 
What I really need is for custom fields (in a deal) to achieve a full and dynamic sync (like native HubSpot fields) - is there any chanc…

posts.author: mchannell777 (matthew.channell@tsw.co.uk)
posts.cookedHtml:
I love the Monday.com and Hubspot integration - just what I have been looking for.

What I really need is for custom fields (in a deal) to achieve a full and dynamic sync (like native HubSpot fields) - is there any chance of this happening? Without having to pay for Zapier, I would like to update a custom field on a deal and see it update in a Monday task. This will allow us to use automations much more effectively.

posts.author: ZakiImtiaz (Zaki | readylogic.co)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @mchannell777 , I wish this was the case, but right now it feel likes custom fields are not supported.

Zapier might be your best choice at the moment.

posts.author: mchannell777 (matthew.channell@tsw.co.uk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Zaki,

I would have to agree

Definitely something that I think would add a lot of value for Hubspot/Monday users. I will look to Zapier for the functionality and keep my fingers crossed for a deeper integration with HubSpot.

It would also be great if we could create Monday items based on more detailed criteria i.e., ‘Create a Monday item if Hubspot Deal is created in X pipeline’ or ‘Create a Monday item if Hubspot Deal is created in X pipeline and deal stage changes to X’. But that’s for another ticket

posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @mchannell777

Welcome to the community! With the Custom Property option in monday.com, you can create custom fields within HubSpot and manage your processes. Once you create custom fields, it becomes visible on every contact record in both HubSpot and monday CRM. Generating custom properties is key to personalizing the CRM and fulfilling unique business needs.

If you’re looking to create custom fields in monday CRM and HubSpot, hire experts from a skilled monday.com consulting company. These consultants apply the mapping User Interface technique and build appropriate field types for your needs, such as multi-line text, single-line text, number, or date.

posts.author: MichaelTomar (Michael Tomar)
posts.cookedHtml: If Zapier isn’t ideal, you could look at alternatives like Skyvia, it supports custom field sync between HubSpot and Monday.com without extra scripting and has a freemium plan.

posts.author: Yuval.Polturak (Yuval Polturak)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Matthew, I came across your post , and it really resonated with some challenges we’ve been hearing from other teams.

I’m currently exploring how teams use both platforms together — what works well, what’s tricky — and your experience sounds really valuable to understand. Would you be open to a short chat about your current setup and the main pain points you’ve run into?

Totally not a sales pitch — just trying to learn from real users so we can better understand the workflows and where the gaps are. I’d really appreciate your time and perspective.

Thanks,

Yuval
